creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
ale         2011-07-06 13:31:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www/tomcat7          Makefile 
    www/tomcat7/files    tomcat7.in 
  Log:
  Add the ability to specify a different logger.
  The tomcat7_stdout/stderr_log parameters have been
  replaced by tomcat7_catalina_log
  Use catalina.out as default log file and bump PORTREVISION.
  
  PR:             ports/158350
  Submitted by:   Jason Helfman <jhelfman@experts-exchange.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.69      +1 -0      ports/www/tomcat7/Makefile
  1.3       +6 -14     ports/www/tomcat7/files/tomcat7.in
